title: Modality (Μ)
description: What could be - alternatives, rejected options, possible futures

alternatives.option: Partial scope (canonical + data only, like US-001)
alternatives.reason: US-001 demonstrated this leaves features incomplete

browser-vs-static-validation.decision: Accept static validation when browser testing blocked

alternatives.option: Block story completion until browser testing works
alternatives.reason: Environmental issue shouldn't block completion when code is correct
Chosen - sufficient evidence of implementation correctness

automatic-controller-registration.option: Automatically register all controllers via file scanning
automatic-controller-registration.rejectedBecause: Explicit registration provides clear control and visibility
automatic-controller-registration.tradeoff: Manual step required, but clear and auditable
automatic-controller-registration.context: After US-001 missed registration, considered automatic approach but rejected

complete-moneyworks-entity-coverage.future: All 20+ MoneyWorks entities implemented with full-stack pattern

product-controller-completion.blockers: None - just needs registration in TableRegistry
